evals.name: BGP RestPy Code Conversion
evals.prompt: Convert the following IxNetwork RestPy code to OTG configuration. This is a 2-port BGP test with bidirectional traffic. Use the code to generate otg_config.json and conversion_report.md.

key_elements: Conversion report mentions BGP peering works
Report mentions multiplier=2 should be expanded at runtime

evals.name: IxNetwork JSON Config Conversion
evals.prompt: Convert this IxNetwork JSON configuration (endpoint-based model) to OTG format. Generate otg_config.json and conversion_report.md. The config describes 2 endpoints with BGP setup.

key_elements: Ports extracted from endpoint chassis/card/port mapping

evals.name: Non-Convertible OSPF Config
evals.prompt: Attempt to convert this IxNetwork RestPy config that uses OSPF routing. The skill should detect OSPF is unsupported and provide a feasibility check report explaining why conversion cannot proceed.

key_elements: Report clearly states conversion is NOT POSSIBLE
Identifies OSPF as blocking unsupported feature

evals.name: BGP with VLAN (Partially Supported)
evals.prompt: Convert this IxNetwork config with BGP and VLAN configuration. The skill should handle VLANs (supported) and produce valid output.
